name: ChkQuery_StatEventFreePeriodAvg
title: ChkQuery_StatEventFreePeriodAvg
description: Returns the average timely distance between events and check starts/stops.
Among other things with this function the average cycle time of a cyclic message can be queried.
return:
< 0: Refers the query error codes
Note
There is a meaningful value available and a positive return value is supplied even if the check has not generated any event.
